DatasetList.description: Listing of datasets visible to the calling principal.

DatasetSummary.description: Per-dataset metadata. See `/datasets/{id}` for the live shape.

Entity_social_registry_household.description: A household participating in Program X

Entity_social_registry_individual.description: A person enrolled in Program X

claims.description: Caller-submitted facts. Per-ruleset shape is configured by the deployment; V1 matching is `normalized_exact` only.

evidence.description: Optional metadata about external documents or artifacts the caller already holds. Raw evidence is not echoed by default.

subject.description: Optional targeted registry subject. The offering binding must explicitly allow targeted verification.

id.description: Known entity primary key to verify against.

MetadataCatalogDocument.description: Portable metadata catalog. See `/metadata/catalog` for the live document.

MetadataDataset.description: Portable metadata dataset record. See `/metadata/datasets/{dataset_id}` for the live document.

fields.description: Field metadata keyed by field name.

entities.description: Entity metadata keyed by entity name.

MetadataDatasetList.description: Portable metadata dataset listing. See `/metadata/datasets` for the live document.

MetadataLanding.description: Portable metadata landing document with links and an embedded scoped catalog.

has_more.description: True when more pages remain after this one.

next_cursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; null when `has_more` is false.

ProblemDetails.description: RFC 7807 Problem Details, returned for every non-2xx response.

examples.detail: no credential provided in Authorization or X-Api-Key header
examples.title: Missing credential

apiKeyAuth.description: Compatibility API-key header accepted by API-key deployments. `Authorization: Bearer` takes precedence when both headers are present.
apiKeyAuth.name: X-Api-Key

bearerAuth.description: API key carried as `Authorization: Bearer <key>`. The gateway hashes the bearer with SHA-256 and matches the fingerprint against `config.auth.api_keys[*].hash_env`.

info.description: Best-effort Registry Relay API document generated from visible metadata.
info.summary: Read-only data gateway exposing entity records, catalog metadata, and SHACL/DCAT-AP shapes for governed datasets.
info.title: Internal Government Registry Relay

get.description:
List `household` records from dataset `social_registry`. A household participating in Program X

Supports pagination via `limit`+`cursor`, projection via `fields`, relationship expansion via `expand`, and configured filters.

parameters.description: Maximum records to return. Capped by the entity's `api.max_limit`.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned in a prior response's `pagination.next_cursor`.
parameters.name: cursor

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of entity fields to project. Unknown fields are rejected.
parameters.name: fields

parameters.description: Comma-separated relationships to expand inline. Limited to the entity's configured `allowed_expansions`.
parameters.name: expand

parameters.description: Filter by exact match on `id`.
parameters.name: id

parameters.description: Filter by inclusion in a comma-separated list of `id` values.
parameters.name: id.in

parameters.description: Filter by exact match on `region`.
parameters.name: region

parameters.description: Filter by inclusion in a comma-separated list of `region` values.
parameters.name: region.in

403.description: Authenticated principal lacks the scope required for this operation.

x-codeSamples.label: httpx
x-codeSamples.source:
import os, httpx

token = os.environ['REGISTRY_RELAY_TOKEN']
resp = httpx.get(
    'http://localhost:4242/datasets/social_registry/household',
    params={'limit': 10},
    headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}'}
)
resp.raise_for_status()
page = resp.json()
for row in page['data']:
    print(row)
next_cursor = page['pagination'].get('next_cursor')

parameters.description: Entity primary key
parameters.name: id

403.description: Authenticated principal lacks the scope required for this operation.

404.description: Parent record not found, or relationship target unavailable.

post.description: Verifies caller-submitted claims against the registry binding selected by the evidence offering. The offering determines the dataset, entity, lookup keys, and ruleset; callers cannot select legacy verification rulesets directly.

parameters.description: Evidence offering identifier
parameters.name: offering_id

parameters.description: Absolute purpose-of-use IRI recorded in the audit trail. Required by this entity's policy. Header names are case-insensitive, so `Data-Purpose` and `data-purpose` are equivalent. Required when the selected evidence offering's bound entity requires a purpose-of-use header.
parameters.name: Data-Purpose

parameters.description: Use `application/json` or omit for the default JSON response. Use `application/vnd.registry-relay.evidence-verification+jwt` to request a signed server-to-server receipt when provenance is enabled and the media type is configured.
parameters.name: Accept

Cache-Control.description: `no-store`; evidence verification responses must not be cached.

400.description: Malformed request body, missing required claims, or missing required `Data-Purpose` header.

404.description: Evidence offering is unknown or hidden from the caller. Runtime code is `offering.not_found`.

406.description: Requested evidence-verification JWT receipt format is not enabled for this deployment or offering.

413.description: Request body exceeds the configured verification limit (`internal.payload_too_large`).
